clips.title: The Arena
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, historical epic, dusty grade. A vast sand gladiatorial arena ringed by stone tiers, sunlit dust hanging in the air. Midday, tense hush. A person in leather-and-bronze arena armor stands ready at the center, weapon lowered, braced. The camera orbits smoothly around them counter-clockwise, circling to reveal the arena on all sides. Hard warm sunlight, drifting dust, 35mm, orbit left. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Craftsman
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm workshop grade. A cluttered woodworking workshop, tools on pegboards, sawdust in shafts of light, a workbench. Afternoon, warm. A person in a canvas apron leans over the bench, carefully planing a piece of wood. The camera orbits smoothly around them counter-clockwise, circling the bench. Warm window light, floating dust, 40mm, orbit left. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Dancer
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. A sunlit dance studio, mirrored walls, a barre, pale wood floor. Morning, soft light. A person in dancewear holds a poised arabesque, arms extended. The camera orbits smoothly around them counter-clockwise, circling the pose, reflections sweeping the mirrors. Soft warm daylight, clean tones, 35mm, orbit left. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Flambe
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, dramatic culinary grade. A professional kitchen station at night, stainless steel, a burst of flame from a pan. Evening service, energy. A person in a white chef's jacket tilts a pan into a dramatic flambe, flames leaping. The camera orbits smoothly around them counter-clockwise, circling the fiery moment. Warm firelight against cool steel, 40mm, orbit left. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Build
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, industrial grade. A garage workshop, a sports car up on a lift, tools and cables, hard work-lights. Night. A person in mechanic's coveralls stands wiping their hands, inspecting the car. The camera orbits smoothly around them counter-clockwise, circling person and car. Hard work-light, deep shadow, 35mm, orbit left. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Summit
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, epic grade. A rocky mountain summit above a sea of clouds, jagged peaks, brilliant sky. Sunrise, cold and warm. A person in mountaineering gear stands triumphant at the peak, arms slightly raised. The camera orbits smoothly around them counter-clockwise, circling to reveal the panorama. Warm sunrise, cold air, 24mm, orbit left. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
